top_signals.title: Chinese Oil Imports May Never Fully Recover From Iran War - Bloomberg.com
top_signals.summary: Chinese Oil Imports May Never Fully Recover From Iran War  Bloomberg.com
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Jindalee Lithium inks stewardship MoU for McDermitt project
top_signals.summary: The MoU establishes a framework for HiTech and RESOLVE to explore the creation of a voluntary Stewardship Area in the broader Oregon-Nevada caldera region.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Heat Wave Hits Europe, Causing Disruption
top_signals.summary: Extreme weather will continue across northwest Europe through the weekend, testing temperature records, according to weather models and analysis from meteorologists. London is forecast to breach 35C on Wednesday. Bloomberg's Joe Wertz reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

top_signals.title: Feds seize alleged cyber-scam infrastructure connected to Southeast Asian company
top_signals.summary: The Department of Justice announced the “seizure of a cloud computing account” used by subsidiaries of the Huione Group, a conglomerate severed from the U.S. financial system last year.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Anschuetz Adds Generic Overlay for SYNAPSIS ECDIS NX
top_signals.summary: Anschuetz has added the Generic Overlay feature, which extends SYNAPSIS (W)ECDIS NX by enabling the direct display of external, geo-referenced data within the chart. Third-party systems can provide their information as overlay layers, visualized…
